input:
Bug report from a downstream C# project (moq.analyzers issue #1010): Moq1302 ('Invalid member ... in LINQ to Mocks expression') fires false-positive on this code:

```csharp
var blobClient = new Mock<BlobClient>();
blobClient.Setup(static c => c.ExistsAsync(It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()))
          .ReturnsAsync(Response.FromValue(false, Mock.Of<Response>(static r => r.Status == StatusCodes.Status200OK)));
```

Warning says 'Invalid member StatusCodes.Status202Accepted'. The user reports the analyzer is wrong. What is the most likely root cause and what specific evidence would confirm it?
